name: Sacred Beasts Released
text: Add 3 "Sacred Beast" monsters with different names from your Deck to your hand, then discard 2 cards. If this card is in your GY, except the turn it was sent there: You can banish it; add 1 Level 10 Pyro, Thunder, or Fiend monster that cannot be Normal Summoned/Set, from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Sacred Beasts Released" once per turn.
